segments.text: No, not you.
Truly cool!
What about all these small pieces in the press room?
They are out of glass, little squares of glass
Today you have come here to worship Me as Shri Ganesha.
We have been singing the praise of Shri Ganesha before every puja and we had such tremendous
respect for Shri Ganesh because, we found out that unless and until Shri Ganesa who
is the symbol of our innocence, it's not awakened within us.
We cannot enter into The Kingdom Of God
and even to stay there
I have to enjoy blessings of Shri Ganesha
we had too have
Our Innocence fully blossoming
so we praise Him
and he is very easily praised.
And whatever we might have done wrong
before coming to Sahaja Yoga,
He completely forgives
because He's the eternal child!
You've seen children
when you slap them sometimes get angry with them
they forget it
They only remember their love
and not what they have suffered at your hands.
Till the grow up,
They do no memory of bad things done to them
From very beginning a child is born into mother
He doesn't know What he has gone through
Gradually the memory starts working
And he start restoring thing within himself
But in the beginning only he remembers what nice things have happened to him.
So we always like ponder about our childhood, and how much we enjoyed it as a child.
As you start growing up remember all your miseries that you had to go through – all
the audience through which we have passed,
We try to magnify it.
In childhood children only remember
The people who've loved them
and not those that hurt them
They don't want to be remembered perhaps
It looks like this
But when they grow up
Then
Only trying to remember
Those people who have harmed
Or have troubled
And thats how
They make themselves very miserable
But the principle of Ganesha is extremely subtle, it's the subtlest and it exists in
everything that It existes on a matter.
In form of vibrations there no matter which without vibration.
It has vibrations which are seen even in the atoms and also in the molecules of all matter
that is existing.
So Shri Ganesha was first one who established in a matter as well, so we can see he exists
He exists in the moon, he exists in whole universe and the whole creation.
And it continues to exist with human beings also only that human being have capacity
To some or other cover up your innocence otherwise animals are innocent
Human beings has their freedom if they want
They can cover up their innocence, they can shut down the doors of Shri Ganesha and say
that He does not exist.
The can cloud it!
And this is why we find among human beings
That there are doing so many horrible things avoiding
the existence of Shri Ganesha, but he acts.
He act in a way that
he shows natural results
off our wrong doings
like if you do things
which are not pleasing to Shri Ganesh
it goes upto point, forgives you
and then
starts emerging out as diseases
as physical diseases, and in women it becomes a mental disease.
Also It can create problems
In the nature
The natural catastrophes are also
only the curse of Shri Kanisha
When people start doing wrong things
behaving in a wrong manner
Collectively, then the natural catastrophe has come to teach them a lesson.
So in his essence though he exists and everything also is that
He had capacity to assert His will
To bring forth destruction of whole world
We have Shri Ganesha's idea as minute thing
We think he can go on a little mouse, though must be very minute.
He is as minute and great!
He surpasses all the deities because of his wisdom
–he's giver-of-wisdom
gives us wisdom
makes learn
He' our guru in that respect
Mahaguru
Because it teaches how we should behave
If you try to surpass Him and try to misbehave, even the Mother won't support because She
knows that those who surpass Shri Ganesha are also people will never respect the Mother.
So He is epitome of respect for Mother – epitome!
He does not know any other gods, he doesn't know Sadashiva or anybody else but only respects
the Mother.
So he is one who has power of devotion and complete surrender to mother that's why
his most powerful deity among all deities – nobody can surpass him in His powers!
We have to understand that as children are growing, Shri Ganesha starts a-growing in them
also.
But!
As they're human beings ,they can somehow or other try to overpower Shri Ganeshwara
So it's the duty of parents who is Sahaja Yogis
to see that they look after their children in a way,
In detached ways
To say that Shri Ganesha is settled.
The first sign of Shri Ganesh and the child
Is wisdom
If he's not wise
if He does not know how to behave
Then it shows
That Shri Ganesa is being attacked by Him
And these days in the modern times, as it is children are very much under attack.
Innocence Is Under Attack and It's Very Difficult For People To Make A Fine Line
As to How Far To Go With Children & how far not too go
Todays Lecture Would Be More Concerning About
How Far To Go with Shri Ganesha
as far children are concerned, because that's a very important point.
Because He is the giver of wisdom so parents must understand if he is the giver
there should be wisdom within me and If I have
The Wisdom then i will have balance
And don't lose tempers with children but try to correct them in such
manner that they get corrected.
On the contrary, if you try to be very harsh with your children –
They might react and they may go astray or
You tried restrict them too much then also
there will behave in same manor
So one thing is taught by your own children
as Shri Ganesha himself does
That respect Your Mother
Your Mother means your Holy Mother and your own mother.
That is very important!
If the father doesn't make a child respect his mother,
The Child can never be alright
because authority comes from Father no doubt
but mother must respected
But for that it's very important
that mother must respect her father
So in presence of children
if you start fighting with each other
misbehaving and talking in a manner that is not proper, also will have very bad effect
on the Ganesha Tattva of child.
This upbringing it's important thing in Sahaja Yoga because by God grace you all
got realized children so must know how far to go with your children make them wiser
to be moral,
To Be Righteous.
First thing is that you should try
preserve their wisdom
If they say something wise
You must appreciate
but They shouldn't also
Say out of place
Out Of Grace
So the misbehavior
Is not to be tolerated in a sense
That whatever is wisdom within
has been expressed outside as light
Now we go further with it
to see how far Shri Ganesha acts.
As I said, in the subtlest of subtlest exists but you have to awaken Him – for example
You've seen that water which is vibrated means what?
Vibrated meaning the Ganesh Tattva being enlightened by that Water so when That Water
goes into your stomach or in to you eyes,
and wherever want put it,
It acts.
Acts is a way that
it excites Isha Ganesh Tattva
Into anything
That You've puted
Now we have got miracles of agriculture
To begin with
Miracles Of Agriculture
Is such
That people are amazed
But its very simple
Once you start exciting the Ganesha principle into
The seed it becomes ten times, sometimes hundred
Times. Even Mother Earth which we think to be
Something dead can be vibrated. Supposing
You Sahaja Yogis walk bare feet on the ground
the Mother Earth gets vibrated.
Such mother earth will act on
The trees,
On grass
On flowers
Everything
As it is
The Sahaja Yogis have been telling Me
That in their ashrams
All the flowers that grow
Are out of size and very fragrant
Like daisies never had fragrance
In London
Or England
Never
Now the daisy's size was so small
It has become big
And you see them everywhere, so fragrant and it is a miracle the first time when I told
somebody that daisies have fragrance.
They couldn't believe It!
When they saw the fragments ,they were surprised.
In same way Ganesha Tattva understands things, organizes works out if it is awakened
If its not sleeping then he doesnt.
So it acts, It works on.
Like a little seed when its sprouts at the tip of
The Seed there is A Little Cell which has got
The Ganesh Tattwa Which Is Being Awakened
so IT knows how to go down
How To Go Round Stone and
And How To Embay itself
AND HOW TO REACH THE SOURCE OF WATER
But IT Has Only The Sense
How Far To Go To Exist
how far to go, to nourish yourself on a very material plane.
How do allow the tree grow?
But this Ganesha Tattva starts becoming
Very-very subtle and subtlest at
The point of Agnya Chakra
At that time of Agnya Chakra
It understands
That it has now the spiritual dimension
The same Ganesha Tattva, which acted in a small little tip of the root now acts for
this spiritual thing.
That's why people close their eyes when they meditate because don't want to see
anything else but still they want Shri Ganesa just act on the meditative process
their Kundalini. This process of meditation, when we close our eyes acts but if you see
that somebody is sleeping and he's dreaming then there will be the eyes all
time moving – they'll have moving eyes!
These Ganesha Tattva are now acted by your attention
If You've an attention which goes from this place to
to that place, then it is affected.
Specially in the case when we start looking at men
and women all of a time
also our Ganesha Tattva gets very much destroyed
Such people are difficult for rising
In their ascent because
Agnya itself goes out
Then this Ganesha Tattva can also be reduced if you are very materialistic, all that worried
about your things like uh…you have something in the house and looking at everything.
All time trying to correct it –all of them worried for matter then these Ganesa Tattvas

Like we're going to a shop and seeing everything
what is there? What should I buy?, like that also if
do too much it will be but supposing your buying something
out of beauty for beauty
You want by something for beautifying in house
That means you were trying doing some thing
to please others, you are doing it
To make other very happy.
Then It acts the other way round
then
It increases your asset
but if is done only
create a kind of joy for
Others sharing
Of beauty whatever
You have bought or taken
But supposing you are buying anything for making others feel jealous, that also I have
recently learnt there is a capacity like this to buy something and make people jealous.
Not just to make somebody happy!
If they're the kind of person who buys things only because it makes them feel jealous
then their Ganesha Tattva can be destroyed.
What you should buy, anything – you should make a beautiful house.
When somebody comes to your home he will say what nice thing we have seen!
Not attachment of the things but attachment
how people feel and how they feel
Nice & relaxed
They feel their Shri Ganesha within them which is beauty
when this feeling comes in then
you should say, there's Ganesha Tattva. And it is a very motherly feeling – like

thing to her Children in the same way that you have that Vatsalya as
this called The Feeling of the Mother For the Child
That subtle feeling You had
people come To My house now see how they are happy
They're enjoying these
and they are appreciating it.
In that way you also satisfy a very great Ganesha principle
is,that You have taken note of the artists
though the artist's are created
there all beautiful things out-of matter
through the Swadhisthana
but without swadishthana being governed by Shri Ganesa
It cannot be beautiful

things have no eternal value today people will buy them

things which have got the subtle Ganesha principle in it acting,
Which makes you soothed down.
It's make You feel peaceful
and makes You happy
is one that Is appreciated
So Shri Ganesh establishes within You
The Higher Self
So the baser self which enjoys all baser things of lives are being cut, tailed down

I mean she cannot be a actress
She can not win any beauty contest
Her face is very serene, very motherly ,very pure, her eyes and why it that she's eternally

The reason there is Ganesha Prince Munira – She'a a Mother!

That came on her face of that love for the child is being depicted by this great artist

Anywhere You go

They'll Show Your photograph
This is Mother&Child
When Christ was brought down
The Mother is there

when see your child

and have told You

all The eggs

am i too much encouraging My Child
am I playing into hands of My Child
